content.en:
200 Supreme Domain Ancestors, more than 30,000 top Domain Ancestors, such a scale does not know how many times beyond the Dao Mountain Realm, and those top Domain Ancestors, any one of them can crush the Dao Mountain Domain Domain Ancestors.

After all, this is the top domain ancestor of the Battle Gate, and he is a real member, not a vassal domain ancestor.

Of course, they were not recruited from the outside like Ye Tian, the requirements for the Ten Holy Gates to recruit geniuses from the outside world were very high, and they had to be geniuses at the top of the All Things List or the One List, otherwise they would not be qualified to enter the Battle Gate.

It doesn't mean that there are fewer people in the Battle Gate, in fact, the descendants born from the predecessors of the War Gate have very low requirements to join the Battle Gate.

For example, both parents are the strongest domain ancestors of the Zhanmen, and the children born can become disciples of the Zhanmen as long as they are not too bad, but they are not holy sons, just ordinary disciples.

The domain ancestors have an endless lifespan, and they will not die due to the exhaustion of their lifespan, the accumulation of endless years, you can imagine how many people there are in the battle gate, it is definitely a very terrifying number, even Ye Tian does not know the specific strength of the battle gate now.

In addition to the Battle Gate, many of the strongest domain ancestors of other forces have been dispatched, and many top domain ancestors have also gone to the Daoshan Realm.

However, the top domain ancestors who dare to act alone are all extremely demonic top domain ancestors, otherwise there is no way to break through the forbidden river, and most of the top domain ancestors still dare to cross the forbidden river under the protection of the strongest domain ancestors.

The Dao Mountain Realm is far away from the Dark Sacred Domain, but the speed of the Supreme Domain Ancestors is very fast, and there are also treasures specially used for traveling through the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Therefore, the time it took for these Supreme Domain Ancestors to rush to the Dao Mountain Realm was not too long.

In addition, the coordinates of the Daoshan Realm have long been exposed, after all, using the rare treasures that are specially positioned to hand over to the Daoshan Realm Domain Ancestors to bring to the Daoshan Realm, you can locate it.

And the Battle Boundary Tower of the Battle Gate can actually be used for positioning, so even if Ye Tian does not reveal the location of the Dao Mountain Realm, he will not be able to hide from those forces in the Dark Sacred Domain.

----------------------

"With the speed of those supreme domain ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain, I'm afraid it will only take 800,000 years for the first batch of domain ancestors to arrive here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, he naturally didn't like the Dark Saint Realm's domain ancestors coming here, that would be tantamount to grabbing the resources of the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

However, he couldn't stop it.

Of course, it wasn't without any benefit for the Domain Ancestors of the Dark Sanctuary to come here.

First of all, this invisibly strengthened the strength of the Dao Mountain Realm, and it was also enough to stimulate the cultivation momentum of the Dao Mountain Realm, in case some Supreme Domain Ancestors were willing to stay here forever, it would be equivalent to adding new strength to the Dao Mountain Realm.

That's a good thing!

The premise is that he must be able to suppress these powerhouses, otherwise the Dao Mountain Realm will be very chaotic.

With Ye Tian's strength, it was indeed no problem to crush the ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors, but the Supreme Domain Ancestors from the Dark Sacred Domain were not ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors, and some of them were also geniuses, and their combat power was very terrifying.

Even some Supreme Domain Ancestors used to be first-class Holy Sons.

Therefore, Ye Tian is afraid that he is far from being their opponent now.

However, Ye Tian is equivalent to the master of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and within the Xuanxu Saint Realm, his strength will be very terrifying, at least dozens of times stronger in combat power.

Therefore, even if it was a top-notch Supreme Domain Ancestor, he was sure to suppress it.

Moreover, once Ye Tianxiu was promoted to the top domain ancestor level, as long as he did not leave the Xuanxu Saint Realm, he could suppress everything.

Time passed slowly, and 800,000 years passed in the blink of an eye.

--------------------------

Daoshan Boundary.

Not far from here, the space was torn apart, and a Domain Ancestor walked out of the void.

They were the domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, and tens of thousands of domain ancestors flew towards the Daoshan Realm together.

"Sure enough, it's a super-large realm, such a realm is very rare, I didn't expect a small realm to evolve into a super-large realm!"

A domain ancestor exclaimed.

"Let's go, let's go see the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

Many domain ancestors flew into the Dao Mountain Realm and flew towards the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

And the advent of so many Supreme Domain Ancestors and Top Domain Ancestors really shocked the Domain Ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm.

"So many Supreme Domain Ancestors !!!"

The Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor was shocked.

Although he had already learned from Ye Tiankou that the domain ancestors of the Dark Sacred Domain would descend on the Dao Mountain Realm.

But directly facing so many Supreme Domain Ancestors, he was still very shocked.

Although the Battle Realm Tower also has a Supreme Domain Ancestor, it usually doesn't see so many Supreme Domain Ancestors.

Because at the level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the Battle Realm Tower was just a place for them to chat, and it was not of great help.

Moreover, the opportunity that the Supreme Domain Ancestor needs cannot be provided by the War Realm Tower.

Therefore, when these Domain Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Realms enter the Battle Realm Tower, the Domain Ancestors they usually see are ordinary Domain Ancestors or top Domain Ancestors, and occasionally you can see some Supreme Domain Ancestors.

Now, 200 Supreme Domain Ancestors appeared in unison, which was too shocking for him.

Xuanxu Holy Realm.

The domain ancestors of the Battle Gate came here, and they all saw the Xuanxu Holy Realm one by one.

"If it's really the Holy Realm, the Holy Realm was born in the realm, it's so strange!"

Some of the domain ancestors wondered.

Another Domain Ancestor said, "Anything in the Dark Forbidden Realm will be born, and it is not impossible for the Holy Realm to be born in a super-large realm. Let's go, let's enter!"

Many domain ancestors entered the Xuanxu Saint Realm one after another, and Ye Tian also appeared at the first time.

Soon, the two sides met.

"I've seen the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

Many domain ancestors said politely.

After all, they are guests, and Ye Tiancai is the master here, so they are naturally much more polite.

Moreover, Ye Tiannai was the First Holy Son, and his status was not ordinary, even the Supreme Domain Ancestors would not disrespect him.

"Domain Ancestors, I have arranged a place for you to live, please come with me!"

Ye Tian took many domain ancestors from the Battle Gate to a new Void Realm, this Void Realm is very large, and the cultivation environment is good, so it is not bad to arrange them to live here.

After the accommodation is arranged.

One of the Supreme Domain Ancestors, who could also be regarded as their representatives, the True Spirit Domain Ancestor, spoke: "Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, we want to enter the Soul Saint Realm to cultivate, I don't know if it's possible?"

The True Spirit Domain Ancestor is a strong man at the peak of the strongest domain ancestor, and he was also a holy son at the beginning, and his strength is very strong, if it weren't for the fact that the soul did not reach the level of giving birth to the soul holy light, otherwise he would have stepped into the invincible domain ancestor level.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

But then, he made some demands.
